no: Romantic Encounters BG1 Check the readme carefully and choose the components and versions you would want. Half of it it's about people doing the naughty, be sure about what you want here. v Amount of details and BG-Style vs description text (required). mod_installer: Large mod with 40+ components. Each component triggers dialogue recompilation (~8-10 min per component). Expect 4-6 hours for full install
a: Berelinde, jastey, Kulyok, Lava Del'Vortel, Thimblerig, Twani
sum: Adds 49 optional romantic and social encounter vignettes throughout BG1. Each is a short scene (flirting, tavern events, chance meetings) that adds flavor.

conflicts.reason: Adventure Pack components cn:2, 48, 51 have FORBID_COMPONENT on bg1re cn:6/27/30/41. Adventure Pack must install BEFORE BG1 Romantic Encounters.
